hyperedges.label: 3-layer progressive disclosure search achieves 10x token savings
7+ IDEs provide MCP-compatible access to Enhanced Cognee
6 planned features forming the 12-month enhancement roadmap
Operations Document Ecosystem
hyperedges.description: The operations documents form a cohesive operations ecosystem: Emergency Recovery handles catastrophic failures, Rollback Procedures handles individual operation undo, Maintenance Scheduling handles automated tasks, Monitoring provides observability, Security Hardening protects the system, and Summarization manages memory lifecycle -- all connected via Production Deployment which orchestrates the entire stack.

hyperedges.label: Project Lifecycle and Audit Trail
hyperedges.description: The audit reports (Comprehensive Audit, Summary, Security Test Results) and implementation reports (Options 3&4, Sprints, Phases) collectively trace the project from initial gap analysis through phased implementation: Sprint 1 foundation established audit/undo/LLM basics, Phases 2-3 delivered dashboard features, Options 3&4 added integration/quality tooling, and security hardening brought the system to 99.8/100 production readiness.

hyperedges.label: Governance and Attribution Chain
hyperedges.description: The policy documents establish the legal and community governance chain: NOTICE asserts Topoteretes copyright, CONTRIBUTORS attributes original work to Topoteretes team and Enhanced Cognee work to Vincent Pereira, DCO ensures developer certification of origin, CODE_OF_CONDUCT defines community standards, and SECURITY provides vulnerability reporting channel -- all required under the Apache License 2.0.

hyperedges.label: Safety System Triad
hyperedges.description: AuditLogger, UndoManager, and ApprovalWorkflow form the core safety triad: audit logging tracks all operations, undo mechanism allows reversal, and approval workflow gates destructive actions

hyperedges.label: LLM Integration Stack
hyperedges.description: LLM prompt templates and token counting form the LLM integration foundation delivered in Sprint 1, enabling all subsequent LLM-powered features (summarization, deduplication, entity extraction, intent detection)

hyperedges.label: Dashboard Ecosystem
hyperedges.description: The dashboard ecosystem combines the FastAPI backend (Sprint 7), UX/UI design package, and JWT security (Sprint 6) into a production-ready web dashboard with real-time updates via SSE

The dashboard specification establishes design principles that directly require WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility compliance, making accessibility a non-negotiable foundational constraint of the entire UI design
The technical implementation section specifies Next.js 14 as the framework with Tailwind CSS for styling and React Query for state management, forming the complete frontend technology stack

The wireframes document provides concrete ASCII visual layouts for the five core views (Dashboard, Memories, Search, Analytics, Knowledge Graph) that directly implement the information architecture defined in the UX/UI specification

nodes.label: Final MCP Tool Classification (20 Auto / 8 Automate / 4 Manual)
nodes.norm_label: final mcp tool classification (20 auto / 8 automate / 4 manual)

properties.description: Procedures and strategies for recovering Enhanced Cognee from catastrophic failures
APScheduler-based cron-driven automated maintenance for Enhanced Cognee databases
Full observability pipeline: Enhanced Cognee to Prometheus metrics, Grafana dashboards, Loki logs, AlertManager alerts
10-category security hardening covering authentication, network, application, database, container, logging, data protection, dependencies, operations, and compliance
Automatic summarization of old memories using LLMs with content preservation and configurable parameters
Transaction-based rollback mechanisms for all major Enhanced Cognee operations including backup restore, deduplication, summarization, and memory deletion
Full production deployment with Nginx reverse proxy, SSL termination, Docker Compose, automated backups, and scaling strategies
Detailed feature comparison between Enhanced Cognee and Claude-Mem showing Enhanced Cognee wins in 12+ areas, Claude-Mem wins in simplicity and resource usage
properties.recommendation: Claude-Mem for individual developers, Enhanced Cognee for multi-agent and enterprise

properties.description: Mixed auto/manual invocation pattern: AI IDEs automatically trigger search/health tools, while users manually trigger add/update/delete operations
properties.hybrid_approach: Auto for read operations, manual for write operations

properties.description: Three-phase 12-month enhancement roadmap with 9 sprints spanning foundation, enhancement, and polish
Simplified deployment mode using SQLite instead of PostgreSQL/Qdrant/Neo4j/Redis, offering 10 essential MCP tools with pip-only installation
properties.migration_path: bidirectional between Lite and Full modes

properties.description: Three-module security framework achieving 99.8/100 security score with 1500 tests at 100% pass rate
Coordination layer integrating Sprint 10 advanced AI features with 21 SDLC sub-agents via Sprint10CoordinationIntegration
Foundation sprint delivering 8 tasks: automation config, audit logging, undo mechanism, Claude API integration, prompt templates, token counting, rate limiting, and Claude Code plugin
Dashboard memory management phase implementing infinite scroll, detail views, advanced search, batch operations, and export with TanStack Query and Zustand
Data visualization phase delivering 15 components including timeline, knowledge graph, analytics dashboard, activity heatmap, and sessions timeline
Core recovery manager for restoring data from backups and validating restored state
Manager for listing, creating, and managing database backups
Manager for listing and undoing memory operations including deletions
APScheduler-based maintenance task scheduler with cron expression support
Native Anthropic Claude API client for memory-aware conversations with tool use
WebSocket server for real-time event broadcasting to dashboard clients
GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow with 7 stages from linting to deployment
Automated security audit script scanning for secrets, injection vulnerabilities, dependency issues, and configuration problems
Coordination integration connecting Sprint 10 advanced AI features with SDLC sub-agent coordination system

properties.name: Sprint 1: Foundation & Testing
properties.focus: Test Suite, LLM Integration, Audit Logging, Undo Mechanism, Token Counting, Prompt Templates

properties.name: Sprint 2: Installation & Auto-Configuration
properties.focus: One-command installation, CLI wrapper, setup wizard, auto-configuration, pre-flight checks, document processor, scheduler, approval workflow

properties.name: Sprint 3: Claude Code Integration & Auto-Injection
properties.focus: Session lifecycle management, context injection hooks, Claude Code plugin enhancement, session summary generation

properties.name: Sprint 4: Progressive Disclosure Search
properties.focus: 3-layer progressive disclosure search, search_index tool, get_timeline tool, get_memory_batch tool

properties.name: Sprint 5: Structured Memory Model
properties.focus: Hierarchical observation schema, auto-categorization, structured search (by_type, by_concept, by_file)

properties.name: Sprint 6: Security Implementation
properties.focus: JWT authentication, API key management, RBAC, encryption at rest, PII detection, GDPR compliance

properties.name: Sprint 7: Web Dashboard
properties.focus: FastAPI backend with 15+ REST endpoints, SSE streaming, HTML/CSS/JS dashboard POC, Next.js 14 dashboard

properties.name: Sprint 8: Advanced Features
properties.focus: Lite Mode, backup automation, backup verification, recovery procedures, maintenance scheduler, periodic deduplication, auto-summarization, 15 MCP tools

properties.name: Sprint 9: Multi-Language & Polish
properties.focus: 28-language support, language detection, multi-language search, cross-language search, performance optimization, advanced search

properties.name: Sprint 10: Advanced AI Features
properties.focus: Intelligent summarization, advanced search re-ranking, semantic clustering, SDLC coordination

properties.name: automation_config.json
properties.purpose: Centralized automation configuration with security-first defaults

properties.name: AuditLogger
properties.purpose: Multi-channel audit logging with structured JSON, sensitive data anonymization, performance metrics

properties.name: UndoManager
properties.purpose: Undo mechanism for automated operations with operation chains and redo capability

properties.name: TokenCounter
properties.purpose: Multi-provider token counting (Anthropic, OpenAI, LiteLLM) with cost tracking

properties.name: Enhanced Cognee CLI
properties.purpose: Unified command-line interface for all operations

properties.name: Setup Wizard
properties.purpose: Interactive configuration wizard for LLM provider selection, port configuration, installation mode

properties.name: Auto-Configuration System
properties.purpose: System capability detection, Docker availability check, port conflict resolution, LLM provider detection

properties.name: Document Auto-Processor
properties.purpose: File system watcher with watchdog, auto-cognify for 12+ file formats

properties.name: Approval Workflow
properties.purpose: User approval system for destructive operations with CLI and REST API interfaces

properties.name: Task Scheduler
properties.purpose: APScheduler-based background task automation with cron scheduling and dry-run support

properties.name: SessionManager
properties.purpose: Session lifecycle management with context injection and automatic cleanup

properties.name: ContextInjectionHooks
properties.purpose: Hook system for Claude Code: session start, user prompt submit, post tool use, session end

properties.name: ProgressiveDisclosureSearch
properties.purpose: 3-layer progressive disclosure search engine achieving 10x token efficiency

properties.name: StructuredMemoryModel
properties.purpose: Hierarchical observation system with 6 memory types and 5 concepts, auto-categorization

properties.name: JWTAuthenticator
properties.purpose: JWT token authentication with role-based permissions

properties.name: EncryptionManager
properties.purpose: Fernet/AES-128 encryption at rest, PII detection, GDPR compliance

properties.name: Dashboard API
properties.purpose: FastAPI backend with 15+ REST endpoints, SSE streaming, JWT authentication

properties.name: Lite Mode
properties.purpose: SQLite-only lightweight mode with FTS5 full-text search, no Docker required

properties.name: BackupManager
properties.purpose: Multi-database backup system supporting PostgreSQL, Qdrant, Neo4j, Redis with compression and rotation

properties.name: RecoveryManager
properties.purpose: Complete restore/rollback system with data validation after restore

properties.name: MaintenanceScheduler
properties.purpose: APScheduler-based maintenance automation for cleanup, archival, optimization, cache clearing

properties.name: LanguageDetector
properties.purpose: Automatic language detection for 28 languages with confidence scoring

properties.name: AdvancedSearch
properties.purpose: Faceted multi-filter search, autocomplete suggestions, fuzzy search with typo tolerance

properties.name: Enhanced Cognee MCP Server
properties.purpose: Main MCP server providing all 53 tools for Claude Code integration

properties.name: Comprehensive Testing Strategy
properties.purpose: 10-category testing framework targeting >95% code coverage with enterprise-scale validation

properties.name: Testing Implementation Roadmap
properties.purpose: 12-week phased testing implementation plan with milestone tracking

properties.name: UX/UI Design Package
properties.purpose: Complete design specification for Enhanced Cognee Memory Dashboard with wireframes and quickstart guide

provenance.rationale: EMERGENCY_RECOVERY.md extensively documents RecoveryManager usage for restore and validate operations across all 4 database types
EMERGENCY_RECOVERY.md references BackupManager.list_backups() for identifying restore points
Both address recovery scenarios but with different scopes: emergency recovery covers catastrophic failures, rollback covers individual operation undo
Emergency Recovery document defines the complete disaster recovery lifecycle from assessment through documentation
MAINTENANCE_SCHEDULING.md comprehensively documents the MaintenanceScheduler API, cron syntax, task types, and configuration
SUMMARIZATION_GUIDE.md links to MAINTENANCE_SCHEDULING.md in Next Steps
Maintenance Scheduling Guide specifies all cron schedules, task configurations, and best practices for automated maintenance
Production Deployment Guide includes monitoring verification section referencing Prometheus and Grafana setup detailed in Monitoring Setup Guide
Monitoring Setup Guide provides complete configuration for the observability stack components
Production Deployment Guide includes a Security Checklist section that maps to the Security Hardening Checklist
Production Deployment Guide documents the complete production architecture including Nginx, SSL, Docker Compose, scaling, and incident response
ROLLBACK_PROCEDURES.md documents RecoveryManager for restore validation, rollback_last_restore, and validate_restored_data
ROLLBACK_PROCEDURES.md documents UndoManager for listing and undoing memory operations
Rollback Procedures document defines all rollback scenarios, processes, and emergency procedures
Security Hardening Checklist enumerates all requirements across 10 security categories
Both address security but from different angles: checklist defines requirements, test results validate implementation
Summarization Guide documents manual, scheduled, and LLM-integrated summarization procedures
Contributors document explicitly attributes the original Cognee project to Topoteretes UG with full repository URL
Contributors document names Vincent Pereira as the sole Enhanced Cognee contributor
Notice document asserts copyright belongs to Topoteretes UG
Options 3 & 4 report documents Task 86 implementation of ClaudeAPIClient in src/claude_api_integration.py
Options 3 & 4 report documents Task 87 implementation of WebSocket server and Next.js frontend integration
Options 3 & 4 report documents Task 90 CI/CD Pipeline setup with 7 stages
Options 3 & 4 report documents Task 89 security audit script with zero critical findings
AUDIT_SUMMARY Question 2 is entirely dedicated to MCP tool invocation modes with detailed auto/manual categorization
AUDIT_SUMMARY Question 3 outlines the 12-month phased enhancement roadmap with 9 sprints
AUDIT_SUMMARY Question 4 provides complete Lite Mode specification including tools, features, installation, and migration paths
Both documents cover the same audit scope with the comprehensive report providing details and the summary providing action items
Audit report lists security hardening as Medium Priority Recommendation #8 with JWT auth, rate limiting, and API key management
Audit report identifies LLM integration for summarization as Critical Priority gap - placeholder only, not functional
Section 4 of the audit report provides a comprehensive feature-by-feature comparison between Enhanced Cognee and Claude-Mem
Audit report Section 3 provides detailed comparison with original Cognee by Topoteretes
Security test results report demonstrates 100% pass rate on all security hardening measures with 99.8/100 score
Security test results report explicitly validates the three-module security framework with 100% test coverage
Phase 2 report documents all 10 delivered memory management components
Phase 3 report documents all 15 delivered visualization components
Sprint 10 guide describes how advanced AI features integrate with the SubAgentCoordinator and 21 sub-agents
Sprint 10 guide provides code examples for Sprint10CoordinationIntegration class usage
Sprint 1 report documents all 8 completed foundation tasks
Sprint 1 foundation deliverables (audit logging, undo, Claude API) are prerequisites for Sprint 10 coordination features
Phase 2 memory management provides data layer that Phase 3 visualizations display; sequential weeks 3-4 then 5-6

links.rationale: Sprint 1 provides the foundational audit logging, undo mechanism, and configuration that Sprint 2 builds upon for installation and automation
AuditLogger was created as Task 2 in Sprint 1 (T1.3.4)
UndoManager was created as Task 3 in Sprint 1 (T1.3.5)
TokenCounter was created as Task 7 in Sprint 1 Update 2 (T1.2.5)
5 LLM prompt templates were created as Task 6 in Sprint 1 Update 2 (T1.2.4)
Sprint 1 produced the automation_config.json that configures all subsequent automation features
Sprint 2 delivers installation and auto-configuration infrastructure that Sprint 3 leverages for Claude Code plugin integration
CLI wrapper was created as Task T2.1.3 in Sprint 2
Setup wizard was created as Task T2.1.7 in Sprint 2
Auto-configuration system was created as Task T2.1.4 in Sprint 2
Document auto-processor was created as Task T2.2.1 in Sprint 2
Approval workflow was created as Task T2.2.5 in Sprint 2
Task scheduler was created as Task T2.2.3 in Sprint 2
Sprint 3 session context and memory association prepares for Sprint 4 progressive disclosure search
SessionManager was created as Task T3.1.6 in Sprint 3
ContextInjectionHooks was created as Task T3.1.2 in Sprint 3
Sprint 4 progressive disclosure search layer is extended by Sprint 5 structured memory model for richer search filtering
ProgressiveDisclosureSearch was created in Sprint 4 as the core 3-layer search engine
Sprint 5 structured memory model is secured by Sprint 6 security implementation including JWT, RBAC, and encryption
StructuredMemoryModel was created in Sprint 5 with 6 memory types and 5 concepts
Sprint 6 security features (JWT, RBAC) are integrated into Sprint 7 dashboard API for authenticated endpoints
JWTAuthenticator, APIKeyManager, and RBACManager were created in Sprint 6
EncryptionManager, PIIDetector, and GDPRCompliance were created in Sprint 6
Sprint 7 dashboard infrastructure is extended by Sprint 8 advanced features including Lite Mode and backup/recovery
Dashboard API (FastAPI backend) was created in Sprint 7
Sprint 8 advanced features are polished and extended by Sprint 9 multi-language support and advanced search
Lite Mode with SQLite and 10 essential tools was created as Part 1 of Sprint 8
BackupManager was created as Part 2 of Sprint 8
RecoveryManager was created as Part 4 of Sprint 8
MaintenanceScheduler was created as Part 5 of Sprint 8
15 new MCP tools were added to the MCP server in Sprint 8 (backup, maintenance, deduplication, summarization)
Sprint 9 multi-language polish is followed by Sprint 10 advanced AI features including intelligent summarization and SDLC coordination
links.provenance: AMBIGUOUS - Sprint 10 mentioned only in FINAL_COMPLETION_SUMMARY.md, not in sprint-specific reports

links.rationale: LanguageDetector was created as Part 1 of Sprint 9
AdvancedSearch with faceted filtering and fuzzy search was created as Part 5 of Sprint 9
6 new MCP tools were added to the MCP server in Sprint 9 (language detection and multi-language search)
UndoManager operations are audit-logged for traceability; both are foundational safety components
links.provenance: INFERRED from shared usage in automated operations

links.rationale: Token counting is used to measure prompt template sizes and ensure they stay within model limits
Scheduler coordinates with document processor for auto-cognify scheduling
Scheduler delegates to approval workflow for destructive scheduled operations (deduplication, summarization)
ContextHooks use SessionManager for session lifecycle and context injection
Progressive disclosure search can filter results by session context
links.provenance: AMBIGUOUS - connection implied but not explicitly stated

links.rationale: Structured memory types and concepts provide richer filtering in progressive disclosure search
Dashboard API uses JWT authentication for secured endpoints
UX/UI design package specifies the frontend interface that consumes the Sprint 7 dashboard API
Lite Mode provides a lightweight SQLite-only alternative to the full 4-database memory stack
RecoveryManager restores from backups created by BackupManager
BackupManager creates backups of all 4 databases in the memory stack (PostgreSQL, Qdrant, Neo4j, Redis)
Testing strategy validates all 4 database components of the memory stack with enterprise-scale targets
12-week implementation roadmap provides the execution plan for the comprehensive testing strategy
